<!--
Thank you for translating. Nothing below is mandatory, it is just a reminder of
the things the checker will flag anyway.
-->

**Language:**

**Checklist**

- [ ] I only changed the values, never the keys
- [ ] Every `{{placeholder}}` is spelled exactly as in English
- [ ] Every `<tag>` is still present
- [ ] I left game terms in English (material, planet, building, recipe, ship names)
- [ ] I did not edit `en/` (it is generated)

Untranslated strings fall back to English, so an incomplete pull request is
welcome. Anything you were unsure about, leave in English and mention it here.

**Notes / questions:**
